data.title: Backpack completed the seventh week of points distribution, and the perpetual contract holdings exceeded 189 million US dollars
data.description: According to official news, Backpack completed the seventh week of points distribution, the perpetual contract holdings exceeded 189 million US dollars, the loaned assets reached 100 million US dollars, and the 24-hour trading volume exceeded 1 billion US dollars, setting a historical record.

data.title: Coinbase Launches the First 24/7 Crypto Futures Trading Service in the U.S.
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Coinbase announced that its subsidiary Coinbase Derivatives has launched the first CFTC-regulated Bitcoin and Ethereum leveraged futures 24/7 trading service in the United States on May 9, covering retail and institutional users. This marks the first time that the US derivatives market has achieved round-the-clock trading, and users can hedge risks and capture market opportunities at any time. Coinbase also plans to introduce perpetual contracts and will provide more compliant derivatives in the future.

data.title: Over $1 Billion in Stablecoins Flood Binance—Major Bull Run Brewing?
data.description:
Key Insights: Nearly $1 Billion in stablecoins landed on Binance, the largest cryptocurrency exchange by trading volume, in one day. That’s the largest inflow since April. On May 8, CryptoQuant contributor Darkfrost highlighted a three-day build-up before the inflow. Traders often park stablecoins on exchanges when they plan to buy crypto
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/09/nearly-1-billion-in-stablecoins-flood-binance-is-a-bull-run-brewing/

data.title: Jeffy Yu told the media that he had been doxxed and harassed and planned to move out
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the San Francisco Standard, Zerebro co-founder Jeffy Yu was found alive after "faking his death". The news of his "death" a few days ago was suspected to be self-directed and self-acted.
According to reports, Jeffy Yu was found outside his parents' two-story home in the Crocker-Amazon community in San Francisco, looking nervous and shocked that reporters were able to find him through Internet searches.
Jeffy Yu said, "I have been doxxed and harassed. If you can find me, others can find me, and now I have to move my parents out of here this week." (The Block)

data.title: Abraxas Capital Withdraws Significant Amount of Ethereum
data.description: According to Odaily, monitoring data from Lookonchain reveals that Abraxas Capital has withdrawn a total of 138,511 ETH from trading platforms over the past two days, amounting to approximately $297 million.

data.title: Polymarket bettors lose big on Pope prediction, accuracy of rare event predictions in question
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Bettors on the crypto prediction platform Polymarket collectively misjudged the election of the new pope. Users who bet on the popular candidates Parolin (28% chance of winning) and Tagle (20% chance of winning) lost more than $28 million, while the actual winner Provost (1% chance of winning) was not favored. This rare event exposed the limitations of the prediction market in low-frequency special events, in stark contrast to its 90% prediction accuracy in political elections.
Anonymous top bettor Domer analyzed that the lack of public information for reference in the papal election led users to over-reliance on traditional data. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Tidal Financial Group applies to the US SEC to launch two Bitcoin and gold hedge ETFs
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Battleshares, a brand under Tidal Financial Group, has submitted an application to the US SEC, planning to launch two Bitcoin and gold hedge ETFs. The product will allow investors to directly bet on the relative performance of the two types of assets through tools such as shorting securities, swap contracts and options. Dhaval Joshi, chief strategist at Counterpoint, believes that Bitcoin will gradually erode the market share of gold, and the long-term bullish BTC/short gold combination has more potential.
This year, gold has hit new highs due to safe-haven demand, while Bitcoin fell in tandem with risky assets during the tariff turmoil in April, but has recently rebounded strongly with the advancement of US digital financial policies. Brent Donnelly, president of Spectra FX, pointed out that Bitcoin is still highly correlated with the Nasdaq 100 Index, while gold reflects the sentiment of "shorting the United States". Data shows that the four major gold ETFs have attracted more than $14 billion this year, and the top Bitcoin ETF has received $8 billion in inflows. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Unveils $32.65M for L2 Scalability, Research, and Education
data.description:
TL;DR $32. 65M Ecosystem Boost: The Ethereum Foundation is distributing $32. 65 million in Q1 2025 grants to accelerate Layer 2 scalability, cryptographic research, and global educational initiatives. Wide-Ranging Impact: The funding supports over 30 projects, including international conferences, hackathons, and developer boot camps, aiming to nurture local talent and strengthen community-building
source: https://crypto-economy.com/ethereum-foundation-unveils-32-65m-for-l2-scalability-research-and-education/
